product_overview: BIBE Estetica is a scheduling platform for a beauty clinic, supporting public browsing, client self-service booking, and admin operations. The app lets clients register, log in, request appointments, manage their bookings, and update their profile while admins configure services, professionals, hours, availability blocks, clients, and appointment statuses.
core_goals: Browse public treatment information and navigate to authentication pages
Create a client account and sign in as a client or admin
Request an online appointment as a client
View, filter, and cancel client appointments
Manage services, service categories, professionals, business hours, and availability blocks as an admin
Review dashboards, calendars, and appointments as an admin
Create and manage appointments and client records as an admin

features.name: Public site and treatment browsing
features.description: Public visitors can view the home page and treatment category pages and navigate toward login or registration.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the public home page content -> Browse treatment categories -> Open a treatment category page -> Observe public treatment information and navigation options
Navigate to /tratamientos/:slug -> View the selected treatment category details -> Return to the public home page or proceed toward authentication

features.name: Authentication and role-based access
features.description: Users can log in, register as clients, and access only the routes allowed for their role.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the login form -> See the app redirect to the appropriate client or admin area
Navigate to /register -> Leave required fields empty -> Submit the registration form -> See validation messages for missing information

Navigate to /register -> Enter a new client name, unique email, password, and optional phone number -> Submit the registration form -> See the account created and the user taken into the client booking flow
Navigate to /login -> Enter valid admin credentials -> Submit the login form -> See the admin area open
As an authenticated client, navigate to /admin/dashboard -> See access restricted to the admin area
As an authenticated admin, navigate to /app/book -> See access restricted to the client area
Log out from the client or admin area -> See the session end and the user returned to a public or login state

features.name: Client appointment booking
features.description: Authenticated clients can request an online appointment by selecting a category, service, professional, time slot, and optional notes.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/book -> Select a treatment category -> Select an online-bookable service -> Select a compatible professional -> Move to a week with available time slots -> Choose an available slot -> Add optional notes -> Submit the appointment request -> See the success page
Navigate to /app/book -> Select a category that has no online-bookable services -> Observe that no reservable service is available for booking
Navigate to /app/book -> Select a category, service, and professional -> Choose an available slot that is no longer available after the selection -> See the slot blocked from being booked again

features.name: Client appointments management
features.description: Authenticated clients can review their appointments by status and cancel eligible appointments with a required reason.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/appointments -> Review pending, confirmed, and history sections -> Filter the list by all, pending, confirmed, or history -> Observe the matching appointments

Navigate to /app/appointments -> Open a pending or confirmed appointment for cancellation -> Leave the cancellation reason empty -> Submit the cancellation request -> See validation for the missing reason
Navigate to /app/appointments -> Open a pending or confirmed appointment for cancellation -> Enter a cancellation reason -> Confirm the cancellation -> See the appointment move to canceled history

features.name: Client profile management
features.description: Authenticated clients can view and edit basic account details.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/profile -> View account identity, role, and status information -> Enter edit mode for name and phone number -> Save valid changes -> See the updated profile details
Navigate to /app/profile -> Enter edit mode for the full name -> Clear the name field -> Save changes -> See validation for the required name

features.name: Admin dashboard
features.description: Admins can review operational metrics, upcoming appointments, and configuration alerts, and use quick actions to move to key admin areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Review operational metrics and upcoming appointments -> Refresh the data -> See the dashboard update
Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Open a metric card -> See the appointments list with the corresponding filter applied
Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Use a quick action to open calendar, clients, or configuration-related pages -> Continue managing operations from the linked area
Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Review configuration alerts -> Open the related management area from the alert link

features.name: Admin services and categories
features.description: Admins can create, edit, activate, deactivate, and assign service categories and services for booking.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/services -> Create a new service category with its required details -> Save the category -> See it appear in the categories list

Navigate to /admin/services -> Create a new service with category, duration, price, and description -> Keep online booking enabled -> Assign compatible professionals -> Save the service -> See the service appear active and bookable
Navigate to /admin/services -> Edit a service -> Enable evaluation required for the service -> Save changes -> See online booking disabled for that service
Navigate to /admin/services -> Search, filter, or sort the service list -> Observe the list update accordingly
Navigate to /admin/services -> Deactivate a service or category -> Later reactivate it -> See the item return to active use

features.name: Admin professionals
features.description: Admins can create, edit, activate, deactivate, and assign services to professionals.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/professionals -> Create a new professional with contact details -> Save the professional -> See the professional added to the catalog
Navigate to /admin/professionals -> Edit a professional -> Assign all services or selected services -> Save changes -> See the professional-service assignments updated
Navigate to /admin/professionals -> Search, sort, deactivate, or reactivate a professional -> Observe the catalog update accordingly

features.name: Admin business hours
features.description: Admins can define weekly working hours for each professional and manage their active state.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/business-hours -> Select a professional -> Create a business hour entry with a day and time range -> Save it -> See the working hour added
Navigate to /admin/business-hours -> Edit a business hour time range -> Save changes -> See the updated schedule
Navigate to /admin/business-hours -> Deactivate a business hour -> Later reactivate it -> See the schedule become available again

features.name: Admin calendar and appointment creation
features.description: Admins can review weekly availability and create confirmed appointments from valid slots for existing or new clients.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/calendar -> Select category, service, and compatible professional -> Switch between weeks -> Review available and occupied slots
Navigate to /admin/calendar -> Choose an available slot -> Select an existing client -> Add optional notes -> Create the appointment -> See the appointment created as confirmed
Navigate to /admin/calendar -> Choose an available slot -> Create a new client and appointment together -> Save the workflow -> See both the client and confirmed appointment created
Navigate to /admin/calendar -> Reset the filters -> See the availability view return to the default state

features.name: Admin appointments management
features.description: Admins can filter appointments, inspect details, and apply valid status transitions such as confirm, reject, cancel, complete, and no-show.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/appointments -> Filter appointments by status, date range, professional, or client -> Review the matching list
Navigate to /admin/appointments -> Open an appointment detail -> Confirm a pending appointment -> See the status change to confirmed
Navigate to /admin/appointments -> Open a pending appointment detail -> Reject the appointment with a reason -> See the status change to rejected
Navigate to /admin/appointments -> Open a pending or confirmed appointment detail -> Cancel the appointment with a reason -> See the status change to canceled by admin
Navigate to /admin/appointments -> Open a confirmed appointment detail -> Mark it as completed -> See the status change to completed
Navigate to /admin/appointments -> Open a confirmed appointment detail -> Mark it as no-show -> See the status change to no-show

features.name: Admin availability blocks
features.description: Admins can create, edit, deactivate, and reactivate professional availability blocks that affect scheduling availability.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/availability-blocks -> Create a new block with type, start, end, and reason -> Save it -> See the block added and the affected time removed from availability
Navigate to /admin/availability-blocks -> Edit an existing block -> Save changes -> See the updated block details
Navigate to /admin/availability-blocks -> Deactivate a block -> Later reactivate it -> See the blocked time affect availability again

features.name: Admin clients
features.description: Admins can create, edit, search, sort, activate, deactivate, and review client history.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/clients -> Create a new client with name, email, phone, and password -> Save it -> See the client added to the catalog
Navigate to /admin/clients -> Edit a client record -> Save name or phone changes -> See the updated client profile
Navigate to /admin/clients -> Search or sort clients -> Open client history -> Review the client's appointment records
Navigate to /admin/clients -> Deactivate a client -> Later reactivate the client -> See the client return to active use

routes.description: Public home page for BIBE Estetica.
Login page for admin and client users.
Client flow to request an online appointment.
Client appointment list, filters, history, and cancellation.
Client profile and editable account details.
Admin operating dashboard for upcoming appointments and configuration alerts.
Admin appointment list, filters, detail, and status transitions.
Admin weekly calendar for availability and appointment creation.
Admin service categories, services, online booking flags, and service-professional assignments.
Admin professional catalog and professional-service assignments.
Admin availability blocks for vacations, sick leave, holidays, manual blocks, and other exceptions.
Admin client catalog, history, activation, and profile management.

features.name: Authentication and role routing
features.description: Login, registration, session persistence, logout, and role-based route protection.
user_interactions: Try protected admin and client routes with the wrong role.
Logout from admin and client layouts.

features.name: Client appointment booking
features.description: Client selects category, service, professional, available week slot, optional notes, and requests an appointment.

features.name: Client appointments and cancellation
features.description: Client views appointments by state and cancels pending or confirmed appointments with a reason.
user_interactions: View pending, confirmed, and history sections.
Filter by all, pending, confirmed, or history.

features.name: Client profile
features.description: Client views and updates editable profile fields.
user_interactions: Enable edit for full name and phone.

features.name: Admin dashboard
features.description: Admin reviews operational metrics, upcoming appointments, quick actions, and configuration alerts.
user_interactions: Click metric cards to open filtered appointments.

features.name: Admin services and categories
features.description: Admin manages service categories, services, booking flags, and service-professional assignment.
user_interactions: Toggle online booking and evaluation-required settings.
Search, filter, sort, deactivate, and reactivate services.

features.name: Admin professionals
features.description: Admin manages professional records and service assignments.
user_interactions: Search, sort, deactivate, and reactivate professionals.

features.name: Admin business hours
features.description: Admin creates weekly working hour ranges for each professional.

features.name: Admin calendar and appointment creation
features.description: Admin reviews weekly availability and creates confirmed appointments from valid slots.
user_interactions: Select category, service, and compatible professional.
Create new client and appointment together.

features.name: Admin appointments
features.description: Admin filters appointments, opens detail, and performs valid status transitions.
user_interactions: Filter by status tabs, date range, professional, and client.

features.name: Admin availability blocks
features.description: Admin creates, edits, deactivates, and reactivates availability blocks for professionals.
user_interactions: Create block with type, start, end, and reason.

features.name: Admin clients
features.description: Admin manages clients and reviews appointment history.

known_limitations.issue: Test run in Vite development mode may be limited to high-priority tests and lower concurrency.
known_limitations.impact: TestSprite may cap frontend execution to 15 tests for stability.

known_limitations.issue: Data-dependent booking tests require at least one active online-bookable service, compatible active professional, active business hours, and free future slot.
known_limitations.impact: Tests may need to create TS QA seed data before exercising end-to-end booking.
